title: Bizzy's Tooltopia Rejected Ideas
description: These are just some rejected Ideas for my mod Bizzy's Tooltopia
body:
This is simply just an addon to my normal mod "Bizzy's Tooltopia" where I add a bunch of rejected ideas I had! The mod adds a whole new advancement line, a new type of armor called "Legal Armor", a bauxite hammer + rod and more!

Note: All the lore in this mod is level 2 cannon and is still in the main timeline unless the main mod defies it or it's just plain sily.

Remember, requires Bizzy's Tooltopia (This is an official addon)

The normal mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/bizzys_tooltopia](https://modrinth.com/mod/bizzys_tooltopia)
